After adding when you consume a substanc: After adding when you consume a substance, the app will present you with a graph relating the amount consumed with the craving level and your emotions, in addition to showing a graph with the triggers that most often lead you to consume the substance. This is where you start to gain more awareness about your addiction.
Initially there are no triggers recorded: Initially there are no triggers recorded, but you can click the icon on the side to include the triggers that lead you to consume the substance. You can choose more than one trigger at the same time. Some common triggers are stress, anxiety, frustration, etc. But certainly you have unique triggers for your case.
How about trying a breathing exercise to: How about trying a breathing exercise to help you not use now?
Add a substance you would like to stop u: Add a substance you would like to stop using.
To start, you need to register which sub: To start, you need to register which substance you use and would like to control with the App. Some examples: alcohol, cigarette, marijuana, cocaine, ecstasy, etc.
After this exercise, do you still feel l: After this exercise, do you still feel like using the substance?
Finally, you can get personalized tips o: Finally, you can get personalized tips on how to deal with each of your triggers in our recommendations section.
In the expenses area you can add how muc: In the expenses area you can add how much you have been spending on your addiction to know how it has been impacting your finances

Learn more about the app and its mission: Learn more about the app and its mission
SoberVerse is dedicated to helping indiv: SoberVerse is dedicated to helping individuals on their journey to recovery. Our mission is to provide tools and insights that empower users to overcome addiction and lead healthier lives.
Your privacy is important to us. All you: Your privacy is important to us. All your data is stored locally on your device and is not shared with anyone unless you choose to synchronize it with another of your own devices.
We would like to thank all the contribut: We would like to thank all the contributors and organizations that made this app possible.
If you have any questions or feedback, p: If you have any questions or feedback, please feel free to reach out to us at support@soberverse.app.
